summary.quantification_method: relative abundance based on protein intensity ratio

primary_variables.matched_definition: Genetic perturbation that reduces or eliminates gene function.
evidence: we performed proteomic and glycoproteomic analyses in the gene knock-out (KO) and wild-type HEK293 cells
Deletion of the STT3A gene had a greater impact on the protein expression than deletion of STT3B

we generated STT3A-knockout (KO) and STT3B-KO cell lines in human embryonic kidney 293 (HEK293) cells using clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeat (CRISPR)-Cas9 gene editing technology

attributes.route_or_context: CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing in HEK293 cells
evidence: we generated STT3A-knockout (KO) and STT3B-KO cell lines in human embryonic kidney 293 (HEK293) cells using clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeat (CRISPR)-Cas9 gene editing technology

attributes.route_or_context: CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing in HEK293 cells
evidence: we generated STT3A-knockout (KO) and STT3B-KO cell lines in human embryonic kidney 293 (HEK293) cells using clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeat (CRISPR)-Cas9 gene editing technology

replicate_hints: five biological replicates were separately performed in the cell culture and protein extraction
Five replicate experiments were conducted for proteomics and glycoproteomics analyses individually

evidence: Compared to the identified proteins in WT cells, 427 and 269 proteins were differentially expressed (fold change (FC) > 2 and p-Value < 0.05) in protein relative abundance in STT3A-KO and STT3B-KO cells

Compared to the identified proteins in WT cells, 427 and 269 proteins were differentially expressed (fold change (FC) > 2 and p-Value < 0.05) in protein relative abundance in STT3A-KO and STT3B-KO cells
Deletion of the STT3A gene had a greater impact on the protein expression than deletion of STT3B

quantification_strategy: relative abundance based on protein intensity ratio

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data-dependent HCD fragmentation was used with label-free quantification (relative abundance calculated as ratio of individual protein intensity to sum of total protein intensity).

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: Explicit use of Oasis MAX extraction cartridges for enrichment of intact N-linked glycopeptides (IGPs) and search using GPQuest 2.0 with a glycan database.
